text: Idk if i need to take my pain seriously what if im overacting?
i was 15 when I started my journey to get an endo diagnosis. Im now 30 and only just getting an MRI...
I have had my for 29 half years stage 4 I feel sorry for the

i’m 17 and i’m currently on a year long waiting list to gynaecology. I have been on my period for 30 days, my mood swings are life ruining, i do not sleep, i can’t eat without feeling ill, and the pain is unbearable, but i am being told i just need to try different birth control and that i have irregular periods because of stress.
